name: Nick's Tire & Auto
description: Cleveland's #1 independent auto repair shop and tire dealer. 4.9 stars with 1,700+ Google reviews. New and used tires, brake repair, engine diagnostics, Ohio E-Check, oil changes, and full-service auto repair. Walk-ins welcome 7 days. No-credit-check financing available.

itemOffered.name: New Tire Sales & Installation
itemOffered.description: New tires from all major brands with FREE premium installation package ($289+ value). Includes mounting, balancing, valve stems, TPMS reset, alignment check, 20-point inspection, rim cleaning, and disposal.

priceSpecification.description: Installation FREE with tire purchase. Tire prices vary by size and brand.

itemOffered.name: Used Tires
itemOffered.description: Quality-inspected used tires. Every tire checked for tread depth, sidewall condition, bead integrity, belt separation, dry rot, and date code.

itemOffered.name: Flat Tire Repair
itemOffered.description: Professional plug-and-patch flat tire repair. Most repairs completed in 15 minutes.

itemOffered.name: Brake Repair
itemOffered.description: Brake pads, rotors, calipers, brake lines, ABS diagnostics. Free brake inspection. Same-day service available.

priceSpecification.description: Starting at $89 per axle for brake pads

itemOffered.name: Oil Change — Conventional
itemOffered.description: Conventional oil change with filter replacement. Includes multi-point inspection and tire pressure check.

itemOffered.name: Oil Change — Full Synthetic
itemOffered.description: Full synthetic oil change with filter replacement. Mobil 1, Pennzoil Platinum, Valvoline, or equivalent.

itemOffered.name: Engine Diagnostics
itemOffered.description: Check engine light diagnosis, OBD-II code reading, advanced computer diagnostics. Diagnostic fee credited toward repair.

itemOffered.name: Ohio E-Check Emissions Testing & Repair
itemOffered.description: Certified Ohio E-Check station. Emissions diagnostics and repair including oxygen sensors, EVAP systems, catalytic converters. Walk-ins welcome, usually done in 20-30 minutes.

itemOffered.name: Wheel Alignment
itemOffered.description: 4-wheel computerized alignment. Corrects pulling, uneven tire wear, and steering issues.

itemOffered.name: AC & Heating Repair
itemOffered.description: AC recharge, compressor replacement, evaporator/condenser repair, heater core, blower motor.

itemOffered.name: Suspension & Steering Repair
itemOffered.description: Struts, shocks, control arms, ball joints, tie rods, wheel bearings, sway bar links.

itemOffered.name: Transmission Services
itemOffered.description: Transmission diagnostics, fluid flush, fluid and filter change, repair for automatic and manual transmissions.

itemOffered.name: Electrical System
itemOffered.description: Free battery testing, battery replacement, alternator, starter motor, wiring repair.

itemOffered.name: Exhaust System
itemOffered.description: Muffler, catalytic converter, exhaust manifold, exhaust pipe and flex pipe repair.

itemOffered.name: General Engine Repair
itemOffered.description: Water pump, timing belt/chain, head gasket, radiator, thermostat, serpentine belt, hoses, coolant flush.

itemOffered.name: Fleet Services
itemOffered.description: Commercial fleet maintenance with priority scheduling, custom service intervals, and volume pricing.
